metadata.description: Tags to apply to the resource
Resource ID of the Container Apps environment
Whether ingress is external (public) or internal only

containers.name: [parameters('name')]
containers.probes: [if(not(empty(parameters('healthProbePath'))), createArray(createObject('type', 'Liveness', 'httpGet', createObject('path', parameters('healthProbePath'), 'port', parameters('targetPort')), 'initialDelaySeconds', 30, 'periodSeconds', 15, 'failureThreshold', 5), createObject('type', 'Readiness', 'httpGet', createObject('path', parameters('healthProbePath'), 'port', parameters('targetPort')), 'initialDelaySeconds', 10, 'periodSeconds', 10, 'failureThreshold', 3)), createArray())]
